    • Using facet for Generalizability Theory

Calculate Sample Size for Residual

calculate_residual_sample_size.Rd

Calculates the number of unique observations for the residual component.

Usage

calculate_residual_sample_size(data, residual_facets)

Arguments

data

A data frame.

residual_facets

Character string of facets making up the residual, separated by colons (e.g., "person:rater:item").

Value

Integer number of unique combinations.

On this page
